description: Ubersuggest is an SEO and keyword research product from Neil Patel that provides domain analysis, keyword research, backlink data, site audits, and related search marketing tools. It is offered as a web application with subscription plans for individuals, businesses, and enterprises.
summary: ubersuggest.com publicly exposes a documented OAuth-protected MCP server for Ubersuggest; pricing docs also state there are currently no API access plans, and no REST, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found for this domain.
